name: EPIROC AB EPIROC CLASS A ORD SH
summary: Epiroc AB is a Swedish industrial company that develops and manufactures innovative equipment, tools, and service solutions for mining and infrastructure projects. Their offerings include drilling rigs, rock excavation equipment, loaders, and ventilation systems, along with related services to enhance productivity, safety, and sustainability for customers worldwide. Headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, Epiroc serves a diverse range of industries, including mining, construction, and natural resources.
